summary: The implementation successfully addresses all four requirements. The backend now has a public query method without authentication checks, the frontend properly fetches and displays lease listings with partial codes and status styling, copy-to-clipboard functionality is implemented with proper disabled states, and an empty state message is present.

hallucinated_features.description: Error handling UI with AlertCircle icon and destructive card styling when API fetch fails
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify error state handling or UI for API failures, only empty state handling is mentioned in REQ-4

hallucinated_features.description: Loading skeleton UI with multiple placeholder cards during data fetch
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify loading state requirements or skeleton UI implementation

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notifications for copy success/failure feedback
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest REQ-3 only specifies clipboard copy functionality but does not mention toast notifications or feedback messages beyond the disabled button message

hallucinated_features.description: Check icon display when code is successfully copied
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify visual feedback (icon swap) for successful copy action

hallucinated_features.description: React Query caching configuration with staleTime, refetchOnMount, and refetchOnWindowFocus settings
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest REQ-2 only mentions 'Data refreshes on page load' but does not specify caching strategy, window focus refetch behavior, or 30-second stale time
